name: smart-doc-assistant
description: Agent RAG conversationnel — LangGraph + ChromaDB + FastAPI + React 18
author: Alexis MASSOL

scripts.stop: npm run stop:backend && npm run stop:frontend
scripts.stop:backend: lsof -ti :8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || pkill -f uvicorn 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.stop:frontend: lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || pkill -f vite 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test:unit: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/unit/ -v
scripts.test:integration: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/integration/ -v
scripts.test:all: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/ -v --cov=. --cov-report=html
scripts.test:coverage: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && pytest tests/ --cov=. --cov-report=term-missing
scripts.test:ingest: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python scripts/test_ingest.py
scripts.test:retrieval: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python scripts/test_retrieval.py
scripts.test:agent: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python scripts/test_agent.py
